The Filmmaker
Behind the Lens

Crafting Visual
Narratives

With over 5 years behind the lens, I've built a career that spans the full spectrum of visual storytelling — from intimate brand portraits to large-scale commercial productions. Currently creating visual content at Media Forum, every project I take on carries the same philosophy: a frame is never just a frame; it's an emotion frozen in time.

My craft covers commercial films, brand narratives, real estate cinematography, restaurant and café shoots, gym content, podcasts, advertisements, and everything in between. I've completed a Video Editing Internship at AMF Institute, Pune, and hold certifications from Nagpur's Zee Institute of Creative Arts in Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Photoshop.

My work earned 1st Prize for Best Cinematography and Best Editing at Zee Institute's Super 30 Short Film Competition — "Nazariya" — a milestone that pushed me to demand more from every frame.

The Journey

Experience
Timeline

2022 — Present
Cinematographer & Video Editor
Media Forum

Creating brand films, commercial advertisements, and real estate video content. Shooting and directing 200+ projects across gyms, restaurants, cafés, and corporate clients. End-to-end production including pre-viz, shooting, color grading, and final delivery.

Current Role
2021 — 2022
Video Editing Intern
AMF Institute, Pune

One-year internship focused on professional video editing workflows, post-production pipelines, and storytelling through the edit. Handled real-world client projects under senior direction.

2020 — 2022
Freelance Cinematographer & Editor
Independent

Independently completed 100+ editing projects across diverse categories. Produced and edited ad campaign videos for digital platforms, and edited podcast content with engaging narrative structures.

2019
🏆 Best Cinematography & Best Editing
Zee Institute of Creative Arts, Nagpur — "Nazariya" Super 30

Won dual awards at a competitive short film festival organized by Zee Institute. The film "Nazariya" recognized excellence in both visual direction and editorial craft.

Award Winner
